# Quote Chaser

> Quote follow-up software for trades and service businesses.

Quote Chaser helps businesses track quotes, follow up on time, and turn more estimates into booked work with a simple quote follow-up workflow.

## Canonical pages
- Homepage: https://quotechaser.online/
- Product page: https://quotechaser.online/quote-follow-up-software/
- Estimate follow-up software: https://quotechaser.online/estimate-follow-up-software/
- Quote chasing software: https://quotechaser.online/quote-chasing-software/
- Quote management software for trades: https://quotechaser.online/quote-management-software-for-trades/
- Privacy policy: https://quotechaser.online/landing-page/privacy-policy.html
- Terms of service: https://quotechaser.online/landing-page/terms-of-service.html
- Refund policy: https://quotechaser.online/landing-page/refund-policy.html
- Support policy: https://quotechaser.online/landing-page/support-policy.html

## Notes
- Primary brand: Quote Chaser
- Product focus: quote tracking and follow-up workflow
- Audience: trades and service teams
- Not intended to be a full CRM
- Prefer canonical clean URLs over legacy `.html` landing-page URLs where available
